snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Brawl Talk! - Power League, Trophy Road Brawler, and Seasonal Rewards!
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! ►► https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! ►► https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don’t let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team’s safe and try to crack open your opponents’. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you’re the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support — or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

http://supercell.com/en/parents/

- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don’t let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team’s safe and try to crack open your opponents’. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you’re the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support — or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

snippet.title: 아들 젠이 벌써 백일잔치를 했어요! [엄마,사유리_15화] - 사유리TV
snippet.description:
#한국식 #100일 #엄마

안녕하세요~ 사유리이에요
이번에는 격리가 풀리고 사랑이랑 오리코도 데리고 오고 감사한 분들한테 인사도 하고 아들 젠 백일잔치도 했어요
준비하는 과정부터 친한 감독님 이랑 같이 사진 촬영도 하고 서툴지만 즐거운 하루였어요~

en.title: It's already time for Zen's 100 Days Celebration! [Mama Sayuri Ep.15]
en.description:
#koreantradition #100days #mom

Hello, I'm Sayuri.
This episode shows how I picked up Sarang and Oriko after my quarantine was over in Korea. 
I had a lot of people to thank and even celebrated Zen's 100th day with a celebration and photoshoot.
Here's how we prepared and how my cameraman friend came to help out for the photoshoot.
It wasn't perfect but it was a fun and happy day.

snippet.title: 영국 부모님이 난생 처음 한국에 와서 충격받은 이유
snippet.description:
#외국인미녀​​​​​​​ #외국인충격​​​​ #문화충격​​​​


안녕하세요 여러분~! 아이스튜디오입니다. 
오늘은 영국에서 오신 에밀리씨와 함께 했습니다~!


한국에 처음 방문한 부모님이 충격받은 이유에 대해 말해주셨는데요~
과연 어떤 이유들로 깜짝 놀래셨는지 궁금하시면 같이 시청하러 가실까요~? 


오늘도 저희 채널을 시청 해주셔서 감사드리고
좋아요와 구독도 잊지 말아 주세요!!

en.description:
The other cats didn't look so happy to see me. 
 
I injured my finger only a bit. There's just a lot of bandages.

id.title: Aku Bertemu Mu Setelah Sekian Lama

Kucing lainnya tidak menyambutku hangat.

Jari tanganku hanya terluka sedikit meskipun diperban.

snippet.description:
브레이브걸스 안무팀 피치스의 롤린 방송 활동 브이로그 Episode 1

첫방 전!!! 운전만해부터 함께 였던 피치스 댄서들이 브레이브걸스 롤린의 역주행과 음원 차트 1위를 축하하기 위해서 깜짝 이벤트를 준비했습니다^^

snippet.title: Bruno Mars, Anderson .Paak, Silk Sonic - Leave the Door Open [Official Video]
snippet.description:
The official music video for Bruno Mars, Anderson .Paak, Silk Sonic's new single "Leave the Door Open"
Download/Stream: https://SilkSonic.lnk.to/LTDOID

Directed by Bruno Mars and Florent Dechard 
Phil Tayag - creative consultant

Limited Edition Collectible CD Single Available Here: https://smarturl.it/LTDO_CDSINGLE

https://SilkSonic.lnk.to/Facebook 
https://SilkSonic.lnk.to/Spotify 
https://SilkSonic.lnk.to/AppleMusic

Lyrics: 
What you doin
(what you doin)

Where you at
(where you at)

Oh you got plans  
(you got plans)

Don’t say that       
(shut yo trap)

I’m sippin wine     
(sip sip)

In a robe               
(drip rip)

I look too good    
(look too good)

To be alone         
(wooohooo)

My house clean  
(house clean)

My pool warm   
(pool warm)

Just shaved        
(smooth like a new born)

We should be dancing, romancing
In the east wing and the west wing
Of this mansion, wus happenin

I aint playin no games
Every word that I say 
Is coming straight from the heart
(so if you tryna lay in these arms)

Imma leave the door open
(imma leave the door open)
Imma leave the open girl
(Imma leave the door open, hopin)

That you feel the way I feel
And you want me like I want you tonight baby
(tell me that you’re coming through)

You’re so sweet 
(so sweet)

So tight
(so tight)

I won’t bite
(ahh ahh)

Unless you like
(unless you like)

If you smoke
(what you smoke)

I got that haze
(purple haze)

And if you’re hungry girl I got filets
(woohooo)

Ooh baby don’t keep me waiting
There’s so much love we could be making
I’m talking kissing, Cuddling
Rose petals in the bathtub
Lets jump in, Its bubblin

I aint playin no games
Every word that I say 
Is coming straight from the heart
(so if you tryna lay in these arms)

Imma leave the door open
(imma leave the door open)
Imma leave the open girl
(Imma leave the door open, hopin)

That you feel the way I feel
And you want me like I want you tonight baby
(tell me that you’re coming through)

La la laaa la la la la la 
(I need you baby)

La la laaa la la la la
(I gotta see you baby)

La la laaa la la la la 
(Girl I’m tryna give you this)
(aaaaahhhhhhhhhh)

Imma leave the door open
(imma leave the door open)
Imma leave the open girl
(Imma leave the door open, hopin)

That you feel the way I feel
And you want me like I want you tonight baby
(tell me that you’re coming through)


The official YouTube channel of Atlantic Records artist Bruno Mars. 11x GRAMMY Award winner and 27x GRAMMY Award nominee Bruno Mars is a celebrated singer, songwriter, producer, and musician with iconic hits like "The Lazy Song", "That's What I Like", "Just The Way You Are", "24K Magic", "Locked Out Of Heaven", and "When I Was Your Man". His legendary body of work also includes blockbuster albums such as Doo-Wops & Hooligans, Unorthodox Jukebox, and 24K Magic, as well as era-defining collaborations like "Uptown Funk" with Mark Ronson, "Finesse" with Cardi B, and "Nothin' On You" with B.o.B. Forever classic, yet supremely innovative, Bruno continues to redefine music, style, and popular culture, pushing the boundaries of pop, R&B, funk, soul, hip-hop, and dance, and remains as influential as ever.

#BrunoMars #AndersonPaak #SilkSonic #LeaveTheDoorOpen

snippet.title: [헝가리부부]천삼백이면 집을 사는 나라? / 160평 부지에 처남이 짓고있는 집 공사현장 방문했습니다~ / 헝가리집값 / 박카스반응
snippet.description:
김패밀리 채널 무료로 구독하기! https://bit.ly/2oTd7t1 감사합니다😁🙇🏻‍♂️❤️

#국제커플 #유럽집값 #박카스 #헝가리집값
후원문의 - dktorrl3219@gmail.com (Paypal account)
                 dktorrl3219 (카카오톡ID)
                 카카오뱅크 3333-14-6843790

안녕하세요~~!
모두 좋은 주말 보내고 계신가요?^^
헝가리는 안타깝게도 코로나 상황이 좋지못해 많이 힘드네요... ㅠㅠ
날이 점점 풀리고 백신이 보급되면서 이제 더 다양한 헝가리모습들을 소개해 드리려고 준비하고 있었는데.... 당분간은 더 조심해야 되겠습니다 ...ㅠㅠ
이번영상은 많은 시청자 분들이 궁금해 하시던 처남이 공사중인 집을 소개해 드리는 영상입니다~!
집값이 너무 싼거 아닌가? 생각 하실수도 있는데 은행에 경매로 넘어온 집을 굉장히 운좋게 샀다고 하더라구요~ 그리고 처음에는 집이라고 하기도 어려운 정말 폐허수준의 집이였는데 독일에 사는 관계로 자주 집공사를 못하다 보니 벌써 5년넘게 집을 짓고 있습니다^^;; 올해는 코로나로 헝가리에 조금 더 머물 예정이라 올해 안에 집 짓는걸 마무리하려는 계획을 세우고 열심히 공사를 진행하고 있더라구요~
그리고 저희 처남은 그냥... 천재입니다..
건축을 전공한것도 아닌데 집을 짓는다니... 그것도 혼자서...
그럼 얼마나 잘 만들고 있는지 잠시 같이 둘러보시죠~
항상 시청해 주셔서 너무나 감사합니다~!❤️


———————————————————————————
내가 사용하는 것
편집기 : 파이널컷 프로X
카메라 : Sony A7M3 - 1.4F 35mm, 2.8F 24-70mm, iphone X, iphone11
음원사이트 : Epidemic sound

snippet.title: [하주연을 만나다] 걸그룹 쥬얼리 멤버 근황... 그 동안 안 보였던 이유
snippet.description:
쥬얼리 새 멤버로 데뷔하자마자
'원 모어 타임'으로 신드롬급 인기를 얻었던 하주연. 
공연과 행사가 너무 많아, 
서울대전대구부산 하루 6곳을 돌고
급할때는 헬리콥터까지 탔었다는군요.
하지만, 이후 뜻대로 풀리지 않았던 연예계 생활...
좌절도 겪었지만, 하주연은 무너지지 않았습니다.
그는 함께 이야기를 나누는 앞 사람을 기분 좋게 웃게 해주는 분이었습니다.

snippet.title: 고(故) 김자옥 동생 김태욱 전 SBS 아나운서 별세 / 연합뉴스 (Yonhapnews)
snippet.description:
고(故) 김자옥 동생 김태욱 전 SBS 아나운서 별세
    (서울=연합뉴스) 김태욱 전 SBS 아나운서가 61세의 나이로 별세했습니다.
    김 전 아나운서는 2014년 폐암으로 별세한 배우 고(故) 김자옥의 동생입니다.
    5일 SBS 관계자에 따르면 김 전 아나운서는 전날 갑작스럽게 세상을 떠났는데요. 정확한 사망 원인은 아직 밝혀지지 않았습니다.
    김 전 아나운서는 CBS와 KBS를 거쳐 1991년 SBS 공채 1기 아나운서로 입사해 약 30년간 SBS 아나운서로 활동했습니다.
    지난해 정년을 맞은 뒤에도 SBS러브FM(103.5㎒) '김태욱의 기분 좋은 밤'을 진행해왔으며, 사망 전날까지도 방송을 통해 청취자와 소통한 것으로 알려졌습니다.
    영상으로 보시죠.

    제작: 김건태·민가경
    영상: 연합뉴스TV

#연합뉴스 #김태욱 #아나운서 #김자옥

◆ 연합뉴스 유튜브  : https://www.youtube.com/yonhap

snippet.title: 댓글 요청 1위 생리대왕 드디어 뜯었다 [네고왕2] Ep.5
snippet.description:
16:45 최초 서버 자폭 선언ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
자매품 [로또왕]도 많은 시청 해달라🍀
https://youtu.be/2Q99XeZvIVI

[계약서]
1. 방송일 기준 7일간 네고왕 패키지 7,990원에 판매
단, 47,000개 한정. 1인당 1세트
 
2. 동기간 내 전 사이즈 단품 60% 할인
단, 1 ID당 1회 한정. 제품별로 5개씩 구매 가능
 
3. 위 이벤트 참여한 사람에 한해 50% 할인 쿠폰 1년간(5, 7, 9, 11, 1월) 발급
 
4. 재구매 매출의 2% 기부 (소비자 1%, 회사 1%)

*3만원 이상 구매 시 무료배송
 
네고왕 장영란
생리대왕 최호진

선팩폭 후네고 예능 [네고왕2]
🔔 매주 금요일 오후 6시 30분
🔔 구독+댓글+알림설정ㄱㄱ

기획 : 고동완
제작 : 강경민 백승엽 배민지 이소영 김지인 백도란 조선화
작가 : 이민정 유희경

#네고왕​ #장영란 #달라스튜디오​

en.description:
16:45 A self-announcement of server going down for the first time lol
Please watch [Lotto King] a lot🍀
https://youtu.be/2Q99XeZvIVI

1. Selling Nego King package for 7,990 won for 7 days
But this is limited to 47,000 packages. 1 package per person.
 
2. Within the same period, a 60% discount for each single product.
1 time per 1 ID. 5 for each produt
 
3. Limited to event participants, giving 50% coupon for a year (May, July, Sep, Nov, Jan)
 
4. 2% donation on re-purchased sales (Customer 1%, company 1%)

*Free delivery when purchased for more than 30,000 won

Nego King Jang Yeongran
Sanitary pad King Choi Ho Jin

Fact Bomb First then Negotiating Show [Nego King2]
🔔 Every Friday at 6:30 p.m.
🔔 Subscribe+Comment+Notification

Planning: Ko Dong-wan
Producer: Kang Kyung-min Baek Seung-yeop Bae Min-ji Lee So-young Kim Ji-in Baek Do-ran Cho Sun-hwa

snippet.title: '확률템 왕국 메이플' 이번에 제대로 터졌다 / 스브스뉴스
snippet.description:
메이플스토리, 2003년에 출시돼 18년 동안 많은 사랑을 받아온 게임인데요. 최근 메이플스토리가 확률형 아이템 조작 논란으로 이슈가 되고 있습니다. 메이플스토리를 개발하고 운영하는 넥슨과 평소에 메이플스토리를 즐기던 유저들 사이에서 점차 커지는 갈등. 많은 유저가 비판하는 메이플스토리의 문제가 무엇인지 스브스뉴스가 알아봤습니다!

✔ 뉴스에는 위아래가 없다, 스브스뉴스

- 스브스뉴스 링크 -
Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/subusunews
Instagram :  https://www.instagram.com/subusunews/
홈페이지 : http://news.sbs.co.kr/news/subusuNews.do?plink=GNB&cooper=SBSNEWS

snippet.title: 미국과 중국이 미얀마 쿠데타에 긴장하고 있는 이유!!
snippet.description:
#미얀마 #중국 #미국
- 참고문헌
1. 논문
김희숙. (2020). 미얀마 2019: 로힝자 위기 이후 국제관계의 변화와 총선을 향한   정치과정. 동남아시아연구, 30(2), 1-37. 
변창구. (2012). 미얀마의 민주화 개혁과 대중·미 관계. 한국동북아논총, (63), 169-187.
장준영. (2009). 미얀마 신군부와 정치변동. 한국외국어대학교 대학원 박사학위논문 .
장준영. (2014). 미얀마-중국 관계의 변화: 헤징과 균형. 동남아시아연구, 24(3), 85-120.
장준영. (2017). 미얀마 2016: 새로운 시대의 시작, 불안한 미래. 동남아시아연구, 27(2), 185-212.
조세현. (2015). 미얀마의 균형외교에 관한 연구. 연세대학교 정경대학원 석사학위논문.
CING CHAIN HUAI. (2017). 미·중 경쟁과 미얀마의 정치 변동 연구. 부경대학교 대학원 석사학위논문.

2. 기사
Economy Chosun, ‘오월동주(吳越同舟) 미얀마... 민주화 세력vs군부’, http://economychosun.com/client/news/view.php?boardName=C03&t_num=13610288, (검색일: 2021.02.09.)
서울신문, ‘미얀마 군부 “무법행위처벌”... 쿠데타 일주일 만에 계엄령 선포’, https://www.seoul.co.kr/news/newsView.php?id=20210209018028&wlog_tag3=naver, (검색일: 2021.02.09.)
연합뉴스, “2017년 로힝야 학살 책임자, 2021년 미얀마의 봄을 짓밟다‘, https://www.yna.co.kr/view/AKR20210202066600076?input=1195m, (검색일: 2021.02.07.)
mbc뉴스, ‘유엔 안보리 “미얀마 사태에 깊은 우려... 수치 석방하라’, https://imnews.imbc.com/news/2021/world/article/6079200_34880.html, (검색일: 2021.02.09.)
